ENGNew: Last Will of an Old Detective
changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Will of an Old Detective"

TextENGNew: ``Hello, Minai speaking.``
``Nfu fu fu!@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3002. Tomoe-chan, how are you doing?@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3003. You haven't been deceived by any bad men, have you? Leaving your body and mind in tatters?``
``...It's been a while since we last spoke, and that's what you have to say?@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3003. I could sue you for sexual harassment, you know?``
``Hmmm? Sexual harassment?@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3005. What is that?``

``Never heard of it?@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3005. It's a concept they have in the west. Harassing a woman by doing obscene acts or saying unnecessarily sexual things. Haven't you heard of it, Ooishi-san?@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3006. ...Would you like to be the one that sets the precedent for it here in Japan?``

``Oh my.@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3007. Sounds like you've gotten cold in the time since we last saw each other, huh?@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3008. We used to be so close that you called me ``Kura-chan,`` so this is a bit of a shock.``

``That was my sister!@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3008. I've said this many times, I'm ``Tomoe`` and my sister is ``Madoka``!@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3009. I'm not the least bit happy that you treat me the way you treat her!@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3010. It's rather annoying!@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3011. If you spend any more time teasing me, I'll hang up right now, ok?!``
``Na ha ha ha!@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3010. Now now, no need to get so angry.@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3011. I was just making a little comforting joke to brighten your irritating days.``

``...A comforting joke? More of a disgusting joke.@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3013. Anyway, did you need something?@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3014. If you're just calling to pass the time, I'll head right over to Okinomiya and kick your ass, ok?``
``Ohhh, how scary.@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3013. You think a kick from your goat-like legs would tuck in my beer belly a little?@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3014. Nfu fu fu!``
``What are you even saying?@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3016. You're not the least bit scared at all.@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3017. And in the first place, you...``
``...Actually, Tomoe-chan.@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3016. In all seriousness, I'd like to lend you a hand.``
It's been a long time since I've heard Ooishi-san use that serious tone of voice. ...After hearing that shift, I instantly set aside my listless mood and readjusted my grip on the receiver.
``There was a recent murder up in the mountains near you, right?@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3018. You know, the one where a woman's burned corpse was found packed into a barrel.``

``Yeah, that was just a few days ago.@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3020. But that case didn't happen in our jurisdiction. It's actually being handled by the neighboring prefectural police, so our own crime scene investigation was only half complete.``
``The victim was a nurse from Hinamizawa, Miyo Takano.@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3020. ...Apparently, some strange details are coming to the surface.``
``Strange details...?@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3022. Did you find something suspicious?``

``Well, you see, I've been reading the autopsy report from your neighbors' investigation,@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3022. ...and it seems they've made a lot of corrections, so I'm starting to doubt its credibility.@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3023. Also, even when I question them about the unclear parts, they tell me nothing in response.``

``There are indeed a lot of people at Forensics over there who are rather insular despite their lack of skill.@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3024. Younger recruits like Matsuoka-kun are about the only ones who'll talk.``

And even his talents are apparently wasted because he's being kept useless on his paycheck by his stubborn superiors. He complained at a recent meeting how things are difficult because of one interference after another on autopsy results.

``...And yet he's the only one on their force who's received foreign forensics training. It's almost like they don't want to catch criminals or something.@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3026. Even though it's high time we consider revising our legal system, with DNA testing in mind... Sheesh...``

``Tomoe-chan, about that.@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3025. I'd like you to make use of your title and connections to convince that man to confirm the facts.@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3026. In particular... I'm curious about the estimated time of death.``
``Time of death...?``
...According to Ooishi-san, there were thin traces of another number in the column describing the estimated time of death.
It's difficult to see, so it's not conclusive... but based on that, he claims there's a possibility that the date is off by at least one day.

``...This is just a theory of mine...@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3028. But perhaps the prefectural police learned that the victim was alive and participating in Watanagashi that night, so maybe they altered the report to make those facts fit together...?``
``Huh?@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3029. ...Isn't that tampering with evidence?!@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3030. If that's the case, isn't that a huge problem?!``

``Well, they may have just been fixing a transcription error.@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3030. ...If the numbers they wrote over were accurate, that would've been no laughing matter for sure.@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3031. As I already mentioned, several people witnessed the victim at the village festival the day before.@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3032. So, if the date is off by one...``
``......A dead woman was walking around?@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3032. Ahahaha! That's impossible~!``
``...So that's how it is, then.``

``Glad you're quick on the uptake.@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3035. However, it's still nothing more than a theory, so I'd like to gather more evidence.@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3036. We need reliable reasoning before we start making any accusations, you see.``
I swallowed hard, understanding Ooishi's concerns.
...Traveling from Hinamizawa to the crime scene would take a long time. Especially in the middle of the night.
In that case... there is a high probability that the true estimated time of death will change based on further investigations.
``Understood.@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3036. For now, I'll make contact with Matsuoka-kun to verify this.@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3037. ...Oh, wait.``
I looked up toward the clock on the wall. The two needles were about to point to 10 o'clock.

``He might already be done for the day by now...@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3039. Would it be all right to take care of this tomorrow morning?@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3040. I'll let you know as soon as I receive confirmation, Ooishi-san.``

``Yeah, that should be fine.@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3038. ...Even so, Tomoe-chan, don't stay there too late. Why don't you head home soon?@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3039. Staying up late takes a heavy toll on your appearances, you know~? Nfu fu fu!``
``I appreciate your concern, but I'm a manager here.@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3042. There are still a lot of things I need to finish cleaning up.``
``Ohhh, that was rude, please excuse me.@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3041. I'm sorry to have increased your workload on such a busy day~.``
``Oh, no. It's not like that.``
It seemed that my sarcasm went over his head, and he took my words seriously.
``Ooishi-san, I have a lot of debts I need to pay you back for.@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3045. So this is no problem at all.@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3046. If it's not about money, I'm always willing to help.``

``Na ha ha ha! Hearing you say that is encouraging.@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3043. What a blessing it is to have such an understanding superior and a cheerfully working junior!@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3044. And when you add your excellent career to that, you're as strong as strong can be.``

``...That sounds entirely like teasing coming from you.@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3048. You're getting pretty old, Ooishi-san, so please don't push yourself too hard, ok?@k@vS20/28/VTT_tomoe3049. If you get yourself killed before you earn your pension, you'll miss out on a lot of money.``

``Ohhh Tomoe-chan, your words cut deep!@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3046. Well, sleep is a must, but you'd be better off bathing regularly, ok?@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3047. I'm sure you're the most putrid smelling female detective in Japan right now~!``
``Come on, I bathe every day! I don't smell!!``
``Na ha ha ha!@k@vS20/11/VTT_oishi3049. All right then, have a good year!``
After setting down the telephone... I moved the sleeves of my jacket to my nose, took a sniff, and grimaced.
``......I should probably take a shower.``
After that, Ooishi tried to call me again several dozen minutes later, but... I was in the bathroom, so I couldn't get to it.
And then.
The Hinamizawa gas disaster occurred just a few hours later.
